prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response:
Verified Purchase ★★☆☆☆  
Waking up arrived on time and in one piece, but the packaging is misleading: instead of the promised “refreshed” feeling you get a jarring reboot, stiff joints, and an existential pop-up ad. The snooze button is tiny, the dream recall is corrupted, and the included sunlight is way too bright for the price. No returns accepted—apparently you have to keep the consciousness.
